focal_character_timelines.selection_reason: Aligned with the movie's ICRP character set.
focal_character_timelines.task3_relevance: Directly aligned with the same key character used in ICRP.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Da Mayor arrives, sweeps the sidewalk for money, sparking tension as Pino resents supporting him, while Mookie defends Da Mayor and clashes with Pino over work duties, prompting Sal to restore order.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: elderly man seeking odd jobs for alcohol money
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Gets a sweeping job at Sal's pizzeria after asking for work, to earn money for a bottle.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: sweeping the sidewalk outside Sal's pizzeria
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: tension with Pino over his presence and work
evidence_quotes: There's a knock on the door and Da Mayor enters.
Sal looks at Pino, who reluctantly gives Da Mayor the broom.
DA MAYOR It will be the cleanest sidewalk in Brooklyn. Clean as the Board of Health.
Da Mayor almost runs out of the pizzeria in his hurry; soon as he finishes he'll be able to get a bottle.

relation_updates: Mookie defends Da Mayor against Pino's insults
Pino shows disdain towards Da Mayor

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Da Mayor defends himself against Mother Sister's insults, claiming he minds his own business and loves everyone, even her; he humorously predicts she'll someday be civil, then drinks beer defiantly.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: neighborhood resident enduring Mother Sister's insults while drinking beer
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Asserts that he loves everyone, including Mother Sister, and predicts she will be civil to him in the future.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Remains in conflict with Mother Sister but has expressed hope for future civility after defending himself.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: eighteen-year antagonistic relationship with Mother Sister
evidence_quotes: Da Mayor don't bother nobody. Nobody don't bother Da Mayor but you.
I love everybody. I even love you.
One day you'll be nice to me. We might both be dead and buried, but you'll be nice. At least civil.
Da Mayor tips his beat-up hat to Mother Sister and takes a final swig of beer just for her.

relation_updates: continues adversarial relationship with Mother Sister
asserts his peaceful nature despite conflict
status_updates: publicly maintains his drinking habit despite criticism
auxiliary.persona_anchor: a man who drinks beer and claims to love everyone despite ongoing conflict

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Mookie encounters Da Mayor, who advises him to always do the right thing before he continues on his way.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: elder advisor offering moral guidance
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Advises Mookie to always do the right thing, speaking as 'Da Mayor'.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: to advise Mookie to do the right thing
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Mookie acknowledges the advice with 'I got it.'
evidence_quotes: DA MAYOR Doctor, always try to do the right thing.
MOOKIE I got it.
DA MAYOR Doctor, this is Da Mayor talkin'.

relation_updates: assumes mentoring role with Mookie
deliberately offers wisdom as 'Da Mayor'
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Identifies himself as 'Da Mayor' when giving advice.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Charlie demands justice after kids drench his car, but police dismiss him; a witness refuses to identify the culprits, and Charlie drives off angrily as officers mock the situation.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: witness interrogated by police
timeline_nodes.salient_development: When questioned by police about the children who drenched Charlie's car, Da Mayor refuses to identify them, stating that those who know won't tell.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Led away from the police interrogation by Mookie.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Police pressure to identify culprits versus Da Mayor's adherence to community code of silence.
evidence_quotes: You know anything about this?
He knows. He's a witness. They all know. He saw the whole thing
Those who'll tell don't know. Those who know won't tell
Mookie emerges from the crowd and leads Da Mayor away from the interrogation

relation_updates: police officers treat him with hostility and mock him
Mookie intervenes to lead him away from confrontation
auxiliary.persona_anchor: A neighborhood figure who avoids informing to police.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Da Mayor defends himself against teens' mockery, revealing his struggles as a father and demanding respect, stating they don't understand his pain or past.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Man on stoop defending his dignity against teenage mockery
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Confronts Ahmad, Cee, and Punchy after they call him an old drunk bum, stating his past inability to feed his children and demanding respect.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: To stop the mockery and be left alone
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Sits back down on his seat cushion on the stoop after the confrontation
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Ongoing struggle with alcohol use and community disrespect, as he sends Eddie for beer and is mocked
evidence_quotes: AHMAD A old drunk bum.
Da Mayor sits back down on his seat cushion on his stoop.

relation_updates: confronts Ahmad, Cee, and Punchy who mock him
Ella defends him and acknowledges his rebuke

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Louise, Eddie's mother, arrives and scolds him for lying and playing in the street, despite Da Mayor saving him from a speeding car. She rejects Da Mayor's concern, asserting her authority in parenting.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: rescuer who saves Eddie and objects to his mother's punishment
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Da Mayor saves Eddie from a speeding car by knocking him to safety, then after Louise hits Eddie, he protests the hitting but defers when she asserts her parenting authority.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Da Mayor has rescued Eddie and been thanked by Louise, but has accepted her authority over disciplining her son.
evidence_quotes: Da Mayor runs across the street and knocks Eddie down, out of the way of the car.
DA MAYOR You didn't have to hit your son; he's scared to death as it was.
LOUISE I appreciate ya helping my Eddie. I truly do, but I'll have nobody question how I raise him, not even his Daddy.
DA MAYOR You're right.

relation_updates: Louise expresses appreciation but asserts her authority over Da Mayor
Eddie is saved and comforted by Da Mayor
status_updates: Da Mayor is recognized as a hero by the crowd and Louise

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Da Mayor reflects on a past heroic moment and considers being heroic more often, but Mother Sister cautions him, acknowledging his good deed without altering their relationship.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Da Mayor is called over by Mother Sister, who acknowledges his act of saving a child.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Mother Sister tells Da Mayor his act was brave but foolish, thanks him, and states it does not change their relationship.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Da Mayor receives acknowledgment from Mother Sister, tips his hat, and their relationship remains distant.
evidence_quotes: Mister Mayor, I saw what you did.
That was a foolish act, but it was brave. That chile owes you his life.
This changes nothing between you and me.
Da Mayor tips his hat.

relation_updates: Mother Sister thanks Da Mayor for saving the child but maintains her distance
status_updates: Da Mayor's heroic act is acknowledged by Mother Sister
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Da Mayor is an old man who reflects on a past heroic moment and responds politely to Mother.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Mookie throws a garbage can through Sal's pizzeria window, igniting widespread violence as Da Mayor saves Sal and his sons from the mob.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: mediator attempting to de-escalate and protect Sal and his sons
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Tries to calm the crowd, is called a 'Tom,' and physically pushes Sal, Vito, and Pino to safety as the riot starts.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: has pushed Sal, Vito, and Pino out of the way as the mob storms into the pizzeria
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: the riot continues with the mob entering Sal's Famous Pizzeria
evidence_quotes: Da Mayor walks in front of the crowd.
DA MAYOR Good people, let's all go home. Somebody's gonna get hurt.
CROWD (OS) Get out of the way, old man. You a Tom anyway.
Da Mayor pushes Sal, Vito, and Pino out of the way as the mob storms into Sal's Famous Pizzeria.

relation_updates: protective alignment with Sal and sons
adversarial stance from the crowd

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Jade and Mother Sister lose their grip on a streetlamp when a powerful gush of water sweeps them away, sliding down the block as Da Mayor chases after them.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: protective pursuer
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Runs after Jade and Mother Sister as they slide away down the block after losing their grip on a streetlamp.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: to reach and help Jade and Mother Sister
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: actively pursuing Jade and Mother Sister down the block
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: whether he reaches them in time
evidence_quotes: Da Mayor runs after them

relation_updates: demonstrates protective concern for Jade
demonstrates protective concern for Mother Sister

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Da Mayor wakes up in Mother Sister's bed, confused; she reveals he nearly died the night before. They check the block from the window, seeing it still standing with Mookie outside.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: survivor and intimate companion
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Wakes up confused in Mother Sister's bed; she informs him he nearly died last night and stayed awake to care for him.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Awake, after conversing with Mother Sister, and looking out the window to see the block and Mookie.
evidence_quotes: Da Mayor wakes up in Mother Sister's big brass bed (she was born in it).
MOTHER SISTER Yes indeed. You almost got yourself killed last night.
DA MAYOR I've done that before.
Da Mayor and Mother Sister both look out the parlor window to see THE BLOCK and Mookie.

relation_updates: establishes intimate domestic relationship with Mother Sister

focal_character_timelines.timeline_summary: Da Mayor, an elderly neighborhood alcoholic, begins by seeking odd jobs for drink money while clashing with residents like Mother Sister. He establishes himself as a moral advisor, upholds community codes, and reveals his painful past. His heroic acts—saving a child and protecting Sal during a riot—earn acknowledgment but no lasting change until a near-death crisis leads to intimate care from Mother Sister.

focal_character_timelines.selection_reason: Aligned with the movie's ICRP character set.
focal_character_timelines.task3_relevance: Directly aligned with the same key character used in ICRP.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Mookie wakes his sleeping sister Jade, who is annoyed and tells him to leave her alone, but he persists and kisses her forehead before leaving.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Mookie waking his sister Jade
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Mookie wakes Jade by playing with her lips, she gets annoyed, he persists, expresses love, and kisses her forehead.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Mookie leaves for work.
evidence_quotes: Mookie's fingers ENTER THE FRAME and start to play with her lips.
He plants a big fat juicy on his sister's forehead.

relation_updates: Mookie affirms love for Jade
Jade expresses annoyance but tolerates Mookie's intrusion

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Da Mayor arrives, sweeps the sidewalk for money, sparking tension as Pino resents supporting him, while Mookie defends Da Mayor and clashes with Pino over work duties, prompting Sal to restore order.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: defiant employee defending Da Mayor and clashing with Pino
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Mookie refuses Pino's order to sweep, defends Da Mayor against being called a bum, and argues with Pino about work duties until Sal stops them.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Sal stops the argument by telling everyone to shut up, and Mookie remains at odds with Pino.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: ongoing tension with Pino over work responsibilities and respect for Da Mayor
evidence_quotes: MOOKIE Wait a minute. Wait a minute. I just got here. You sweep. I betcha Sal asked you first anyhow.
MOOKIE Da Mayor ain't no bum.
SAL Both of youse--shaddup. This is a place of business.

relation_updates: defends Da Mayor against Pino's insults
clashes with Pino over work duties
auxiliary.persona_anchor: defiant employee who stands up for Da Mayor

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Buggin' Out demands Black figures on Sal's Wall of Fame, citing Black customers' patronage; Sal refuses, leading to confrontation and a call for boycott.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: employee who escorts Buggin' Out during confrontation
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Mookie is asked by Buggin' Out about the lack of Black figures on the Wall of Fame and later physically removes Buggin' Out as Sal threatens with a bat.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Buggin' Out is outside Sal's, calling for a boycott.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: the demand for Black representation on the Wall of Fame and the initiated boycott
evidence_quotes: BUGGIN' OUT How come you ain't got no brothers up?
MOOKIE Ask Sal.
Mookie intercepts them, and takes Buggin' Out outside.

relation_updates: acts as reluctant mediator between Buggin' Out and Sal
prevents physical confrontation by removing Buggin' Out
auxiliary.persona_anchor: neutral party intervening to prevent escalation

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Mookie tells Buggin' Out to return in a week, promising the issue will be resolved; they exchange a handshake as Buggin' Out claims he's cool.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Peacemaker making a promise to de-escalate conflict
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Mookie tells Buggin' Out to return in a week, promises the issue will be squashed, and they shake hands.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Squash the issue within a week
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Buggin' Out agrees to wait, as shown by his statement and the handshake, temporarily pausing the conflict.
evidence_quotes: MOOKIE Buggin' Out, I gotta work here.
BUGGIN' OUT I'm cool. I'm cool.
MOOKIE Come back in a week, it will be squashed.
They give each other five.

relation_updates: solidifies alliance with Buggin' Out through a promise and handshake

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Mookie delivers pizza, demands fair tip after climbing five flights, and receives only a dollar, which he reluctantly accepts before vowing retaliation.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Pizza delivery worker facing disrespect over tip
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Mookie climbs five flights to deliver pizza, argues for a fair tip, receives only one dollar, and expresses anger with a threat to future deliveries.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Angry and has verbally threatened to ruin future pizza deliveries.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Whether Mookie will act on his threat to mess up future deliveries.
evidence_quotes: Mookie is hiking up a flight of stairs.
Sweat drips off his face.
MOOKIE A dollar! Cheap bastard! Your pizza is gonna be fucked next time.

relation_updates: Conflict with customer Nilda over inadequate tip
status_updates: Felt disrespected and underpaid for his effort

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Radio Raheem explains his 'LOVE' and 'HATE' rings, symbolizing an eternal struggle where love ultimately triumphs over hate, leaving Mookie silent but understanding.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: listener and respondent to Radio Raheem's speech
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Mookie listens to Radio Raheem explain the love/hate rings, says he understands, and reciprocates brotherly love.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Mookie has affirmed mutual brotherly love with Radio Raheem.
evidence_quotes: MOOKIE I understand.
MOOKIE I love you, Black.

relation_updates: Mookie and Radio Raheem express mutual brotherly love

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Jade urges Mookie to take his job and responsibilities seriously, warning she can't support him forever, while Mookie deflects, claiming he always gets paid, escalating tension over accountability and dependence.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Mookie confronted by Jade about his work at Sal's
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Mookie dismisses Jade's concerns about his job, asserts he always gets paid, and Jade states she is financially supporting him.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Mookie remains defiant and does not acknowledge the responsibilities Jade references.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Jade mentions unspecified responsibilities that Mookie should address.
evidence_quotes: I'm working.
I always get paid.
I'm carrying you as it is.
What responsibilities?

relation_updates: Conflict escalates with Jade over work ethic and financial dependence

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Vito insists he doesn't let Pino push him around, despite Jade's suggestion otherwise, and questions if Mookie shared the information.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Employee threatened with firing by Sal
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Sal warns Mookie he is pushing it and threatens to fire him, saying he'll be in the street with his homeboys.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Mookie's job is threatened, but Sal's attention shifts to Jade after she enters.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Whether Sal will follow through on his threat to fire Mookie.
evidence_quotes: Mookie, you are pushing it. You're really pushing it.
You're gonna be in the street with the rest of your homeboys.
Mookie has nothing to say.
Pino and Mookie look at each other in agreement, neither likes what he has seen.

relation_updates: Sal's attitude towards Mookie shifts to more adversarial due to work conflict
status_updates: Mookie's job status is threatened with potential termination

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Mookie throws a garbage can through Sal's pizzeria window, igniting widespread violence as Da Mayor saves Sal and his sons from the mob.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: employee destroying his workplace
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Mookie throws a garbage can through Sal's pizzeria window, triggering a riot.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Mookie has sided with the crowd, and Sal's pizzeria is being stormed and destroyed.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: What will happen between Mookie and Sal after this destruction.
evidence_quotes: He screams. MOOKIE HATE!!!!
Mookie hurls the garbage can through the plate glass window of Sal's Famous Pizzeria.

relation_updates: Mookie severs ties with Sal by destroying the pizzeria
status_updates: Mookie becomes an active participant in the riot
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Mookie acts with rage against his employer, as shown by his scream and action.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Mookie and Sal share a tense exchange after Sal pays him; they refuse leftover money, then Sal advises doing the right thing, prompting Mookie to take the money and leave.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: employee demanding wages after the pizzeria riot
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Mookie confronts Sal in the smouldering ruins, demands his pay, receives $500 thrown at him, and after Sal advises doing the right thing, picks up the money and leaves.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Mookie departs with $500 after picking up the money from the sidewalk.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Whether taking the money was the right thing to do, as per Sal's advice.
evidence_quotes: MOOKIE I wants my money. I wants to get paid.
SAL Doctor, always try to do the right thing.
He quickly scoops them up. MOOKIE I got it.

relation_updates: Sal expresses past fondness but current disappointment
Financial transaction completes their employer-employee relationship
status_updates: Relationship with Sal ends with money exchange

focal_character_timelines.timeline_summary: Mookie, a delivery worker at Sal's Famous Pizzeria, navigates conflicts with his boss, sister, and community while dealing with racial tensions and personal frustrations. He mediates disputes, faces job insecurity, and struggles in his relationship with Tina. His actions culminate in destroying the pizzeria during a riot, after which he collects his pay and moves on.

focal_character_timelines.selection_reason: Aligned with the movie's ICRP character set.
focal_character_timelines.task3_relevance: Directly aligned with the same key character used in ICRP.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: At Sal's pizzeria, Pino refuses to work, insults the business, and deflects to Vito, escalating tension until Sal asserts authority, threatening violence amid rising family conflict.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Father and pizzeria owner enforcing work duties
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Sal strikes Pino on the head after Pino refuses to sweep and insults the pizzeria.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Get Pino to sweep the front of the pizzeria
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Pino is silent after being hit, and Sal threatens to kill somebody
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Pino's defiance and conflict between the sons over work tasks
evidence_quotes: SAL Pino, get a broom and sweep out front.
PINO I didn't want to come to work anyway. I hate this freakin' place.
he pops Pino upside the head
SAL I'm gonna kill somebody today.

relation_updates: Escalates conflict with Pino over work duties
Asserts authority over both sons
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Uses physical force to discipline sons when they resist work orders

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Buggin' Out demands Black figures on Sal's Wall of Fame, citing Black customers' patronage; Sal refuses, leading to confrontation and a call for boycott.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Pizzeria owner controlling his establishment's decor
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Sal refuses Buggin' Out's demand for Black figures on the Wall of Fame, states his ownership rights, and threatens him with a baseball bat.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Keep the Wall of Fame limited to Italian Americans as he decides
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Buggin' Out is ejected and calls for a boycott of Sal's
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Conflict over racial representation and authority in the pizzeria
evidence_quotes: Sal comes from behind the counter with his Louisville Slugger Mickey Mantle model baseball bat.
Don't come back, either.

relation_updates: Adversarial relationship established with Buggin' Out
Pino and Vito physically support Sal's position
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Physically intimidates with a bat to defend his business decisions

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Radio Raheem turns off his music and asks for two slices with extra cheese; Sal refuses service due to the music and quotes the price, emphasizing his no-music rule in the pizzeria.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Pizzeria owner enforcing no-music rule
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Sal refuses service until Radio Raheem turns off his music, grabs his Mickey Mantle bat during the standoff, and after Radio Raheem complies, serves him while restating the no-music rule.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Enforce the pizzeria's no-music rule against disruptive behavior
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Radio Raheem turns off the music and is served, but the confrontation leaves tension
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: The use of the bat as a threat and the underlying conflict with Radio Raheem
evidence_quotes: SAL No service till you turn dat shit off.
Sal grabs his Mickey Mantle bat from underneath the counter.

relation_updates: Hostile standoff with Radio Raheem
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Maintains rules through confrontation and implied threat of violence

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Pino faces ridicule for working in a Black neighborhood and wants to leave, but Sal insists on staying, defending his right to operate the pizzeria there as an American.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Father and owner defending his pizzeria's location against his son's objections
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Sal rejects Pino's proposal to sell the pizzeria and leave the Black neighborhood, countering with economic reasons and asserting his authority as father and owner.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Keep Sal's Famous Pizzeria operating in its current location
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Sal has asserted his decision to stay, and Pino is quiet, indicating Sal's authority is reinforced but tension remains.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Tension with Pino over the pizzeria's location and neighborhood safety
evidence_quotes: Since when do you know what's best for us?
Do your friends put money in your pocket? Pay your rent? Food on ya plate?
This is America. Sal's Famous Pizzeria is here for good.
I'm your father, you better remember that.

relation_updates: Asserts authority over Pino
Strained relationship with Pino due to disagreement on business future
status_updates: Reinforced as decision-maker for family business
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Insists on his right to operate the pizzeria where he chooses and emphasizes his paternal authority

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Mookie confronts Sal to leave his sister Jade alone; Sal dismisses him and assigns a pizza delivery to an address Mookie checks for accuracy.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Confronted by Mookie about leaving Jade alone
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Sal dismisses Mookie's demand to leave Jade alone and assigns a delivery task.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Sal has avoided the confrontation and given Mookie a delivery assignment.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Sal's intentions toward Jade are not addressed.
evidence_quotes: SAL Mookie, I don't know what you're talking about, plus I don't want to hear it.
SAL Here, you gotta delivery.

relation_updates: Sal dismisses Mookie's concern about Jade
Sal assigns delivery to Mookie, avoiding the issue
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Redirects to work duties when confronted personally.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Radio Raheem, enraged after Sal destroys his boombox, attacks and chokes Sal; Vito, Pino, and Buggin' Out intervene while others watch, escalating the confrontation.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Pizzeria owner who destroys Radio Raheem's boombox
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Sal uses his Mickey Mantle bat to smash Radio Raheem's boombox, stopping the music and destroying the property.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Stop the disruptive music from Radio Raheem's boombox in the pizzeria
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Radio Raheem chokes Sal in retaliation
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Ongoing physical confrontation with Radio Raheem
evidence_quotes: Sal grabs his Mickey Mantle bat from underneath the counter and brings it down on Radio Raheem's box, again and again and again.
Radio Raheem picks Sal up from behind the counter and starts to choke his ass.

relation_updates: Directly attacks Radio Raheem's prized possession
status_updates: Uses Mickey Mantle bat as weapon
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Resorts to destroying property to address disturbances

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Mookie throws a garbage can through Sal's pizzeria window, igniting widespread violence as Da Mayor saves Sal and his sons from the mob.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Business owner involved in a fight that escalates after police kill Radio Raheem
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Sal is choked by Radio Raheem during a sidewalk altercation, police intervene and kill Raheem, leaving Sal and his sons defenseless as the crowd becomes an angry mob.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Sal is injured and on the sidewalk, being helped by his sons, with an angry mob focused on him.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Sal is left unprotected and targeted by the mob's rage after police departure.
evidence_quotes: but Radio Raheem is a crazed man. It takes all six cops to pull him off Sal, who is red as a beet from being choked.
The mob looks at... ANGLE--MOB POV Sal still on the sidewalk, being helped to his feet by Vito and Pino, who are in bad shape themselves.
The cops, in their haste to get Radio Raheem out of there, have left an angry mob of Black folks with a defenseless Sal, Vito, and Pino.

relation_updates: Becomes target of community rage following Radio Raheem's death
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Physically injured and vulnerable after being choked and abandoned by police.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Da Mayor, Sal, Vito, and Pino watch a destructive event unfold; Sal questions why it happened, Da Mayor implies their presence as white people triggered it, and Pino reacts with racist anger.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Sal, as a victim, seeks an explanation for the destruction.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Sal questions why his business is being destroyed, and Da Mayor explains it was because they were the first white people the crowd saw.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Sal learns from Da Mayor that the attack was racially motivated.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Sal is confronted with the racial targeting of his business.
evidence_quotes: SAL There it goes. Why?
DA MAYOR You was there. First white folks they saw. You was there.

relation_updates: Da Mayor provides racial explanation for attack
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Sal seeks to understand the cause of the violence.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Sal, Vito, and Pino watch Sal's Famous Pizzeria burn down, with close-ups highlighting each man's reaction.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: owner watching his pizzeria burn
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Sal looks on as Sal's Famous Pizzeria goes up in smoke, with a close-up on his reaction.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Pizzeria destroyed by fire
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Business completely lost
evidence_quotes: Sal, Vito, and Pino look on as Sal's Famous Pizzeria goes up in smoke.
CLOSE--SAL

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Mookie and Sal share a tense exchange after Sal pays him; they refuse leftover money, then Sal advises doing the right thing, prompting Mookie to take the money and leave.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Owner of the destroyed pizzeria in post-riot confrontation
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Sal pays Mookie $500 after a tense argument over wages, advises him to do the right thing, and announces he will take a day off to go to the beach.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Take a day off and go to the beach
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Mookie takes the money and leaves; Sal remains at the smouldering pizzeria planning to go to the beach.
evidence_quotes: Sal emerges from the wreckage; he looks like he might have slept there.
SAL Mookie, I always liked you. Not the smartest kid, but you're honest. Don't make me dislike you.
SAL Doctor, always try to do the right thing.
SAL Yeah!...I'm goin' to the beach for the first day in fifteen years. Gonna take the day off and go to the beach.

relation_updates: Sal expresses past fondness for Mookie but warns him not to make him dislike him
Tense exchange over money and morality strains their relationship
status_updates: Sal possesses money but is dealing with financial and emotional loss
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Pays Mookie and gives moral advice despite the pizzeria's destruction.

focal_character_timelines.timeline_summary: Sal, the Italian-American owner of Sal's Famous Pizzeria, asserts authority over his business and family while navigating escalating racial tensions in the neighborhood. His refusal to compromise on the pizzeria's identity and rules leads to violent confrontations, culminating in the destruction of his business during a riot. In the aftermath, he confronts the loss and his complex relationship with his employee Mookie.
